name: SYSTEM CLOCK
description: "The system clock is the primary clock input for the SDC, and all synchronous logic operates on the rising edge of the system clock."

name: SYSTEM RESET
description: "The system reset is an asynchronous, active-low signal that clears all registers to default and deasserts the chip select when asserted low."

name: PERIPHERAL SELECT
description: "The peripheral select signal is driven high by the APB master to select the SDC."

name: TRANSFER ENABLE
description: "The transfer enable signal marks the second cycle of an APB transfer."

name: WRITE ENABLE
description: "The write enable signal is high for write and low for read operations."

name: REGISTER ADDRESS
description: "The register address signal is an 8-bit address bus that selects the target register."

name: WRITE DATA BUS
description: "The write data bus is a 32-bit data bus from the master to the SDC during writes."

name: READ DATA BUS
description: "The read data bus is a 32-bit data bus from the SDC to the master during reads."

name: TRANSFER ACKNOWLEDGE
description: "The transfer acknowledge signal is asserted high by the SDC to complete the APB transaction."

name: SERIAL CLOCK
description: "The serial clock signal is generated by the SDC and its frequency is set by the baud rate divisor."

name: MASTER DATA OUTPUT
description: "The master data output signal is the serial data output from the SDC to the external slave."

name: MASTER DATA INPUT
description: "The master data input signal is the serial data input from the external slave to the SDC."

name: CHIP SELECT
description: "The chip select signal is an active-low output that is driven low at the start of a frame to address the external slave."

name: INTERRUPT REQUEST
description: "The interrupt request signal is asserted when transmission is complete or a parity error is detected."

name: TRANSMISSION COMPLETE
description: "The transmission complete signal is pulsed for one clock cycle when the last bit of a frame has been shifted out."

name: TRANSMIT ACKNOWLEDGE
description: "The transmit acknowledge signal is set when the remote slave confirms receipt of the last transmitted byte."

name: FIFO EMPTY STATUS
description: "The FIFO empty status signal is asserted when the transmit buffer has no pending data and is ready for a new frame."

name: DATA VALID
description: "The data valid signal is asserted for one cycle when a new received byte is available in the receive buffer."

name: PARITY ERROR FLAG
description: "The parity error flag signal is set and held when a parity mismatch is detected on the received byte."

name: RECEIVE BUFFER FULL
description: "The receive buffer full signal is an active-low flag that is deasserted when the receive buffer cannot accept additional bytes."

name: FLOW CONTROL ENABLE
description: "The flow control enable signal is set in the control register to activate CTS/RTS-style handshaking."

name: CLOCK SIGNAL
description: "The clock signal is a signal that provides the timing for the SDC."

name: SYSTEM CLOCK SIGNAL
description: "The system clock signal is the primary clock input for the SDC."

name: SERIAL CLOCK SIGNAL
description: "The serial clock signal is generated by the SDC for the SPI interface."

name: CHIP SELECT SIGNAL
description: "The chip select signal is an active-low output that is driven low at the start of a frame to address the external slave."

name: MASTER DATA OUTPUT SIGNAL
description: "The master data output signal carries serial data from the SDC to the external slave."

name: MASTER DATA INPUT SIGNAL
description: "The master data input signal carries serial data from the external slave to the SDC."

name: TRANSFER ACKNOWLEDGE SIGNAL
description: "The transfer acknowledge signal is asserted high by the SDC to complete the APB transaction."

name: INTERRUPT REQUEST SIGNAL
description: "The interrupt request signal is asserted when transmission is complete or a parity error is detected."

name: TRANSMISSION COMPLETE SIGNAL
description: "The transmission complete signal is pulsed for one clock cycle when the last bit of a frame has been shifted out."

name: TRANSMIT ACKNOWLEDGE SIGNAL
description: "The transmit acknowledge signal is set when the remote slave confirms receipt of the last transmitted byte."

name: FIFO EMPTY STATUS SIGNAL
description: "The FIFO empty status signal is asserted when the transmit buffer has no pending data and is ready for a new frame."

name: DATA VALID SIGNAL
description: "The data valid signal is asserted for one cycle when a new received byte is available in the receive buffer."

name: PARITY ERROR FLAG SIGNAL
description: "The parity error flag signal is set and held when a parity mismatch is detected on the received byte."

name: RECEIVE BUFFER FULL SIGNAL
description: "The receive buffer full signal is an active-low flag that is deasserted when the receive buffer cannot accept additional bytes."

name: FLOW CONTROL ENABLE SIGNAL
description: "The flow control enable signal is set in the control register to activate CTS/RTS-style handshaking."
